__meta__.label: English
__meta__.note: Placeholders use {name} format; compatible with i18next / vue-i18n / Flutter intl

summary.startSingle: Light up your first ring today
summary.startMulti: Light up your first ring today
summary.fullTriple: All three rings complete — Today's done!
summary.midSilver: One more ring to reach silver

walk.name: Walking
walk.desc: {current} / {goal} steps done, about {remain} to go. Keep going at a light-to-moderate pace — small daily steps add up to lasting energy.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.desc: Slept {current} / {goal} hours last night — strong finish. Try going to bed a touch earlier; your sleep quality and energy recovery will be even more stable.

burn.name: Burn
burn.desc: Burned {current} / {goal} kcal. A short walk or easy-paced workout will easily hit today's active goal.

water.name: Water
water.desc: Drank {current} / {goal} ml today. Finish the remaining {remain} ml before evening, and keep sips light before bed so it doesn't disturb your sleep.

stand.name: Stand
stand.desc: Reached {current} / {goal} stand hours. Every stand-up loosens your body and eases the stiffness that builds up from sitting too long.

run.name: Run
run.desc: Logged {current} / {goal} km — halfway there. If you're feeling good tonight, add a relaxed run to wrap things up and boost your energy.

medicine.name: Medication
medicine.desc: All medication tasks for today are complete, {current} / {goal} on time. Logging your daily routine helps you manage your health rhythm with more confidence.
